case_title: MARK HEITNER VS. NISSAN NORTH AMERICA, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT NISSAN NORTH AMERICA, INC. CORPORATION SERVICE COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,694.95 FILED BY HEITNER, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT NISSAN NORTH AMERICA, INC. CORPORATION SERVICE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-20-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-20-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY KEITH TOMPKINS--EMPLOYEE. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEITNER, MARK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NISSAN NORTH AMERICA, INC. CORPORATION SERVICE COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
